data.body: PROVENANCE TRACED + CACHING FEASIBILITY CONFIRMED. (1) The per-child split is bespoke ca03 (dry-frost-zenith, commit 832b3af0) for context-window fitting ('never chunk content'), NOT a workflow-migration regression and NOT a partial-re-review mechanism (container loop has no checkpoint/scoping; grace-thud-feint's delta-re-review uses a tripwire probe and rejected subset-reuse). (2) Prompt caching is FEASIBLE + PROVIDER-SAFE: pydantic-ai 1.107.0 CachePoint (messages.py:692) translates to Anthropic cache_control and SILENTLY no-ops on openai/gemini/mistral (models/openai.py:1693, gemini.py:409) — no break, no gating needed. Min prefix 4096 tokens (Opus 4.8), 5m TTL, read ~0.1x, break-even at 2 calls. Title/scope refined from 'parallelize' to the full token+wall-clock plan.
